# feat(tourism): add Grab-style TripPlan proposal flow

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `9027db2df1c0` — feat(tourism): add Grab-style TripPlan proposal flow

**Body**:

Backend:
- Add TripPlan model (tourist proposes itinerary, guide accepts)
- POST /api/trip-plans — create proposal
- GET /api/trip-plans — list (filter by tourist/guide/status)
- POST /api/trip-plans/{id}/accept — guide accepts (status → ACCEPTED)
- PUT /api/trip-plans/{id} — update status/tour_date/etc
- Add validation to create_booking (guide/tourist must exist, positive numeric fields)

Flutter:
- CreateTripPlanScreen — propose destination, interests, stops, duration, group size
- TripPlanListScreen — tourist view + guide view (isGuideView flag)
- TripPlan model + ProposedStop model
- ApiClient methods for all TripPlan endpoints
- "My Plans" tab in bottom nav (lightbulb icon)
- Guide picker dialog for demo guide acceptance
- Add back button to CreateTripPlanScreen
- Add tip text on interests screen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
